title: microlicia peruviana
intro: Microlicia peruviana, also known as Peruvian lavender, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Microlicia peruviana include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of Microlicia peruviana include essential oils, teas, and infusions that can be used to promote a good night's sleep, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues.
